items.title: A strong shift by Jose Alvarado to help stabilize things after Jalen Brunson went out of the game. Knicks chipped away, trail 31-28 four minutes into the second quarter, as the refs review a foul call on Wemby guarding a KAT drive.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: A strong shift by Jose Alvarado to help stabilize things after Jalen Brunson went out of the game. Knicks chipped away, trail 31-28 four minutes into the second quarter, as the refs review a foul call on Wemby guarding a KAT drive.

items.title: Some good Jose Alvarado minutes here for New York to keep the Knicks in it without Brunson, who is checking in.
items.author: James L. Edwards III
items.body_excerpt: Some good Jose Alvarado minutes here for New York to keep the Knicks in it without Brunson, who is checking in.

items.title: the (maybe) six-foot jose alvarado being unafraid of wemby checks out
